sections.heading: ZX-410 fault E17
sections.text: To reset the ZX-410 solar inverter after fault E17, isolate AC power, wait thirty seconds, and reconnect the supply.

sections.heading: ZX-400 fault E12
sections.text: To restart the ZX-400 solar inverter after fault E12, disconnect the panel input, inspect the cable, and restore power.

sections.heading: Power converter recovery
sections.text: A power converter that stops after an overload should cool before an operator restores electrical service.

sections.heading: Parental leave
sections.text: Employees may take six weeks of paid leave after the birth or adoption of a child. Manager approval records the family absence.

sections.heading: Medical leave
sections.text: Employees recovering from illness may request medical leave with a clinician certificate and manager approval.

sections.heading: Vacation allowance
sections.text: Employees schedule annual vacation in the time-off system after confirming team coverage.

sections.heading: Caregiver terminology
sections.text: A new parent becomes a caregiver after a birth or adoption. Family support policies describe help for the caregiver and child.

sections.heading: Time-away terminology
sections.text: Time away from work is also called leave or paid absence. Vacation, medical recovery, and family events are different absence categories.

sections.heading: Equipment terminology
sections.text: An inverter is a power converter. Reset, restart, and restore describe related equipment recovery actions.

sections.heading: Multi-factor authentication
sections.text: MFA requires a password and a one-time code before account access is granted.

sections.heading: Password rotation
sections.text: Privileged service passwords rotate every ninety days and must not be shared.

sections.heading: Access review
sections.text: Managers review account permissions quarterly and remove access that is no longer required.

sections.heading: Travel reimbursement
sections.text: Submit transport and hotel receipts within thirty days after business travel.

sections.heading: Backup restoration
sections.text: Restore a database backup in an isolated environment before replacing production data.

sections.heading: Record retention
sections.text: Finance records remain available for seven years before approved deletion.
